name: Manual Testing Course with 100% Placement Support
description: Comprehensive 12-week Manual Testing and QA training program.

mainEntity.name: Is coding required for manual testing?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. This manual testing course for freshers requires zero programming knowledge. You'll learn test case writing, Jira, and basic SQL—no complex coding involved.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of the manual testing training?

acceptedAnswer.text: The standard program is 12 weeks with 90+ hours of live classes. Fast-track batches complete in 6 weeks (intensive schedule).

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary after completing this qa qc course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Freshers earn ₹3-5 LPA. With 1-2 years experience, salaries reach ₹5-8 LPA. Senior manual testers with ISTQB certification earn ₹8-12 LPA.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide placement guarantee?

acceptedAnswer.text: We provide 100% placement support—guaranteed interview calls, resume building, and referrals. Final selection depends on your interview performance. Our track record: 5,000+ placements with 90%+ students getting offers within 60 days.

mainEntity.name: Can I attend from outside Mumbai? Is manual testing online course available?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Our qa online training is live and interactive—attend from anywhere in India. Recorded sessions available for revision. Students from Pune, Bangalore, Delhi, and abroad have completed successfully.

mainEntity.name: What is the manual testing course fees structure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Online: ₹15,000 + GST. Classroom: ₹18,000 + GST. Pay After Placement available for eligible candidates. EMI: 3 installments (0% interest).

mainEntity.name: Will I get ISTQB certification?

acceptedAnswer.text: We provide ISTQB Foundation Level exam preparation (syllabus, mock tests, practice questions). The official exam is conducted separately by ISTQB (fees ~₹3,500). Register via our ISTQB Registration Portal.

mainEntity.name: What are the skills required for manual tester roles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key skills for manual testing include: Test case design and execution, Defect tracking and reporting, Jira/Bugzilla tools, Basic SQL for database validation, Agile/Scrum methodology, Communication and analytical thinking. All covered in our curriculum.

mainEntity.name: Is this qa testing course suitable for working professionals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. We offer weekend batches (Sat-Sun) and evening slots for working professionals. Online mode lets you learn without commuting.

mainEntity.name: What happens if I miss a class?

acceptedAnswer.text: All sessions are recorded. Access recordings for 1 year. You can also join the same topic in another batch (subject to availability).

mainEntity.name: Do you cover mobile app testing course content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Module 7 includes mobile app testing—Android/iOS installation testing, compatibility, interruptions (calls, SMS), and UI validation.

mainEntity.name: How is this different from a free testing course online?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our paid quality assurance training includes: Live instructor support (not pre-recorded videos), Real projects with mentor feedback, ISTQB prep and certification guidance, Placement team assistance and referrals, Industry-recognized certificate. Free courses lack personalization, projects, and job support.

mainEntity.name: Can I switch to automation testing later?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Manual testing is the foundation. After 6-12 months in a QA role, enroll in our Automation Testing Course to learn Selenium, Java, and TestNG.

mainEntity.name: What are common qa manual testing interview questions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Top questions we prepare you for: Difference between SDLC and STLC? Explain defect life cycle. White box vs black box testing? What is regression testing? Write a test case for login page. Severity vs priority in defect reporting? We provide a bank of 50+ qa manual testing interview questions with answers.

mainEntity.name: Is the testing course near me in Mumbai/Thane?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We have classroom centers in Mumbai (Mira Road - Head Office) and Thane (Vasai - Study Center). Students from Andheri, Borivali, Dadar, Thane West, Kalyan, and Vasai-Virar can attend in person.

mainEntity.name: What is qa manual tester role in Agile teams?

acceptedAnswer.text: QA manual testers in Agile: Participate in sprint planning and daily standups, Write test cases for user stories, Perform regression testing after each sprint, Collaborate with developers for bug fixes, Validate acceptance criteria before demo. Module 4 covers Agile QA extensively.

mainEntity.name: Can I get a job as qa manual tester without a degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: While most companies prefer graduates (any stream), diploma holders and 12th-pass candidates with strong portfolios have been placed. Focus on building 5+ solid projects and acing interviews.

mainEntity.name: What is the refund policy?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you're not satisfied within the first 2 weeks, we offer a full refund (minus processing fees).

mainEntity.name: How do I enroll in the testing course with placement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Click 'Enroll Now', call +91 78-883-837-88, choose your batch (weekday/weekend, online/classroom), pay fees (EMI/full/Pay After Placement), receive login credentials for LMS and Zoom, and start learning on batch date!

mainEntity.name: Do I receive a completion certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you'll receive a verifiable course completion certificate that highlights your practical skills, projects, and competencies for hiring managers.
